TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Larry_Anderson_(actor), title = Larry_Anderson_(actor), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Larry_Anderson_(actor)} }

S.FORM: Larry Anderson kawas tay 1952, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 9, Larry Anderson, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Larry Anderson kawas tay 1952, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 9, Larry Anderson, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: larrj an*ers~ɕon kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, larrj an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
